summary: Phishing attempts to acquire sensitive information such as usernames, passwords, and credit card details by masquerading as a trustworthy entity.

actions.description: Isolate the affected user account and reset credentials immediately.
Block the sender's email address or domain at the email gateway.
Scan internal logs to identify if other users received similar communications.

prevention: Implement MFA for all sensitive accounts.
Conduct regular anti-phishing training for employees.
